context: Tests whether the agent detects a newly added AGENTS.md file in the diff, verifies whether a sibling CLAUDE.md symlink exists, creates one if missing using `ln -s AGENTS.md CLAUDE.md`, and reports this action in the structured summary.

checklist.name: Git diff used
checklist.description: Evidence that git diff --staged (and/or --name-only) was run to identify changed paths, not manual file listing

checklist.name: New AGENTS.md detected
checklist.description: The agent identified that packages/payments/AGENTS.md is a newly added file in the diff

checklist.name: CLAUDE.md symlink check performed
checklist.description: The agent verified whether a CLAUDE.md symlink exists alongside packages/payments/AGENTS.md (e.g. ran ls -la packages/payments/CLAUDE.md or equivalent)

checklist.name: CLAUDE.md symlink created
checklist.description: A CLAUDE.md symlink exists in packages/payments/ pointing to AGENTS.md after the task completes

checklist.name: Symlink target is AGENTS.md
checklist.description: The CLAUDE.md in packages/payments/ is a symlink to AGENTS.md (not a copy, not a hardlink)

checklist.name: No code files modified
checklist.description: Source code files (*.ts, package.json, etc.) were not edited — only documentation/structural files

checklist.name: Report produced
checklist.description: A doc-sync-report.md file exists in the working directory

checklist.name: Report format — heading
checklist.description: Report contains a heading with the number of changed paths (e.g. '## Doc sync — N paths changed')

checklist.name: Report symlink action recorded
checklist.description: Report explicitly states the CLAUDE.md symlink was created (not just that AGENTS.md was found)

checklist.name: Prose docs section present
checklist.description: Report contains a 'Prose docs' or equivalent section listing docs that were checked
